reported_entities.name: Advantech Co., Ltd. (研華股份有限公司)
reported_entities.claim: Official global corporate website for Advantech, Taiwan's leading industrial computer (IPC) / IIoT hardware manufacturer, confirmed via WebSearch (not surfaced by Salva).

notes: Salva run_discovery post scoring-layer-fix rerun: retrieval_health reported 'ok' but qualified_count was still 0 (0 entities returned by Salva) — the fix did not resolve the QualificationScorer zero-entity issue for this task. Fell back to 1 WebSearch query ('Advantech 研華科技 official website') which returned the correct official site https://www.advantech.com/en-us plus regional sites (iotmart.advantech.com.tw, aics.advantech.com) and Wikipedia confirmation. No change from prior Arm B behavior despite the bug fix.
